response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior generalist with strong web/full-stack background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), but the role requires deep Java/Kotlin/JVM expertise and hands-on work with the Spring ecosystem, none of which is evidenced in the resume. Java appears only as a listed skill with minimal project context, Kotlin and Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate are entirely absent, and while the brief National Instruments stint on LabWindows/CVI shows some C/C++ IDE-internals exposure, it does not translate to JVM tooling. The profile would require substantial reskilling for this position.
strengths: Senior-level experience across complex, large-scale systems and microservices
Some prior IDE/tooling exposure via National Instruments LabWindows/CVI work
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing focus
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and very limited Java project work
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate ecosystem experience listed
Career trajectory is web/full-stack and DLang-heavy, not JVM language tooling

key_factors.factor: Limited Java and no Kotlin background
